name: Pass-the-Hash Attack
description: Detects NTLM authentication patterns indicative of pass-the-hash attacks
query:
// Pass-the-Hash Detection
// NTLM auth from unusual sources
events from authentication
where event_type = "ntlm_authentication"
  and logon_type = 3
  and authentication_package = "NTLM"
group by username, source_ip
having count(distinct target_hostname) > 5
within 300 seconds
